description: An install auto-tracks (acme/weather-widget, verified), currently resolved at 1.2.0 (its persisted resolved-version high-water mark). A newly published, validly-signed index carries a HIGHER index-document metadata version -- so channel-index/1 CHI-060's monotonic-metadata-version check passes -- but its channel pointer sets verified: 1.1.0, an older, non-yanked, since-superseded version. Auto-tracking must not follow the pointer backward: refused as POINTER_ROLLBACK_REJECTED, because CHI-060 guards only the index's own metadata version, never the pack version a pointer names. The current 1.2.0 is not itself revoked, so MKT-050's revert-to-known-good exception does not apply and no downgrade is performed.
